wine_bars.name: Wine Fandango
wine_bars.address: Calle Vara de Rey 5, 26003 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: List of more than 100 wines, many from Rioja in both modern and classic styles; around 20 rotating by-the-glass pours, plus wine flights and porron service
wine_bars.description: Wine bar and kitchen in an Espolon palace from two Rioja-trade brothers; deep by-the-glass board, flights and a vermouth-led aperitivo.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Vara de Rey - n5 - 26003 Logrono - La Rioja

wine_bars.name: Tastavin Vinos y Pinchos
wine_bars.address: Calle de San Juan 25, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: More than 100 references with over 60 Spanish wines kept fresh on Coravin, focused on Rioja with by-the-glass tastings alongside Michelin-level tapas
wine_bars.description: Small Calle San Juan wine bar using Coravin to pour rare bottles by the glass; a Rioja-deep list matched to refined pintxos.

wine_bars.name: Bar Soriano
wine_bars.address: Travesia de Laurel 2, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Classic Calle Laurel pintxo bar pouring young and crianza Rioja by the glass to match its single mushroom pintxo, served since 1972
wine_bars.description: Calle Laurel institution since 1972 known for one perfect grilled-mushroom pintxo, washed down with glasses of Rioja at the counter.

wine_bars.name: Bar Blanco y Negro
wine_bars.address: Trav. Laurel, 1 BAJO, 26001, Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Centenary Calle Laurel bar with Rioja by the glass served alongside its famous matrimonio pintxo of anchovy and boqueron
wine_bars.description: Late-19th-century Calle Laurel bar famed for the matrimonio pintxo, pouring rounds of Rioja in the heart of the elephant trail.

wine_bars.name: La Taberna del Tio Blas
wine_bars.address: Calle Laurel 1, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Creative Calle Laurel pintxo bar pairing Rioja by the glass with modern bites; allergy-aware menu and a regularly changing pour list
wine_bars.description: Modern Calle Laurel taberna pouring Rioja by the glass against inventive pintxos like goat cheese with berries and cod fritters.

wine_bars.name: Bar Angel
wine_bars.address: Calle Laurel 12, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Family Calle Laurel bar founded 1960 pouring wines from more than 20 wineries by the glass to match its setas (wild mushroom) pintxo
wine_bars.description: Calle Laurel bar run by the founding family since 1960, pouring Rioja from 20-plus wineries alongside its signature wild-mushroom pintxo.

wine_bars.name: Vinoteca San Agustin
wine_bars.address: PLAZA SAN AGUSTIN n4, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: More than 200 references of wine, cava, sparkling and vermouth with by-the-glass tastings and guided pairings in the old town
wine_bars.description: Old-town vinoteca and tasting bar with 200-plus references, pouring Rioja and vermouth by the glass alongside cheese and Spanish conservas.

wine_bars.name: The One Wine
wine_bars.wine_program: Plaza Mayor wine shop and tasting room with more than 250 terroir-driven wines, an Uncorking Room for by-the-glass tastings from around EUR 3
wine_bars.description: Bright Plaza Mayor wine bar in walled Laguardia pouring 250-plus rotating terroir wines by the glass in its Uncorking Room.

wine_bars.name: Los Canos
wine_bars.address: Plaza San Martin 5, 26200 Haro, La Rioja, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Short but sharp Rioja by-the-glass list in a 16th-century palace on Haro's La Herradura, poured with pinchos and raciones at the bar or terrace
wine_bars.description: Bar in a 16th-century palace on Haro's lively La Herradura, pouring a curated Rioja-by-the-glass list with pinchos at the counter or terrace.

verified.address_quoted: Plaza San Martin, 5, Haro, La Rioja
